_doc: Cells the coverage matrix should show as N/A (not_expected) instead of 'missing': partitions whose report genuinely does NOT disclose a given statement (verified against the PDF — never used to hide an extraction gap for data that IS printed). statement='*' = every NON-CORE lane this partition is missing (core BS/PL/cross always stay flagged); statement may also be a single key or a LIST of keys. period and kind default to '*' (wildcard = every quarter / both consolidation bases) — use them for a bank that STRUCTURALLY never files a lane; period (and statement) may also be a LIST to scope a bank that omitted a lane only in some quarters. Entries are applied only when the cell is otherwise 'missing'.

not_disclosed.note: İşbank states branches/personnel only in the interim activity report (Q1–Q3), which the annual (Q4) audit PDF does not bundle; Q1–Q3 ARE extracted (2026Q1 = 1,019 branches / 20,630 staff). Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.
Aktifbank states the count only in the interim activity-report KPI (Q1–Q3); the annual (Q4) audit PDF does not bundle it. Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.
Takasbank states personnel only in the interim activity report (Q1–Q3); the annual (Q4) audit PDF does not bundle it. Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.
Türk Eximbank states no branch/personnel count in these earlier interim + all annual (Q4) reports (began stating '25 of which are branches' later). Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.
Arap Türk Bankası states no branch/personnel count in any report (neither Section-I nor an activity report). Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.

TSKB interim filings are brief stubs with no activity report; only the annual (Q4 consolidated) activity report states personnel — and that IS extracted (this entry flips only the still-missing interim/unconsolidated cells). Verified 2026-07-15.
Development bank; these 2022–early-2023 reports state no count anywhere (began stating '1 şube / çalışan sayısı N' in Section I later). Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.
New digital participation bank; these 2024Q2–2025Q2 reports state no count anywhere (began ~2025Q3). Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.
Newly-formed bank; its 2023Q4 report states no count anywhere (began 2024Q1). Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.

Participation (Katılım) bank — interest-free; reports profit-share-rate risk (kâr payı oranı riski) as a market-risk capital charge + narrative, NOT the interest-rate repricing ladder (no Faizsiz/non-interest column, no asset-liability repricing schedule with a Toplam Pozisyon row). Verified against PDFs 2026-07-15.
